data.body: The closer to the modern era you get the more fascinating "lost at sea" becomes as a backstory element. Being lost at sea in 1612 is a downright normal kind of lost to be. Being lost at sea in 2012 is like, okay, back up – I need to hear this one.

data.body:
You don’t have a writing problem. You have a process problem. Clarity comes after you empty your ideas. That’s why you feel stuck: too many ideas, no structure, over-editing. Use brainstorm → outline → draft. Your book starts moving. Watch: vist.ly/4yk5y
 #writeyourbook #writingprocess
